verdict.answer_first: Both state it immediately; A says "The main problem is using floating-point arithmetic" and B says "the main problem is using floating-point math for money".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to a concrete fix with "Fix: do money math in integer minor units (cents)" while A surveys "integer minor units (cents) or a decimal type" and asks a follow-up.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on now because it gives a drop-in function returning cents and says to store cents at the source.
